messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill as required.

The `doumentupload_url` from the payload is:
`https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584210196983144616Document_1.pdf`

Now loading the report-analyzer skill:















Now updating the Cosmos DB document with the analyzed highlight data merged into the original payload:



✅ Document `1a3e18e3-9f1b-48fc-908b-fbbd7c841a8a` has been successfully updated in Cosmos DB (`PatientDocument`) with 7 structured `highlightData` lab findings.
